def solve(grid, k)
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size if m > 0 else 0
  visited = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, false) }
  count = 0
  directions = [ [-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1] ]
  
  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      if grid[i][j] > 0 && !visited[i][j]
        queue = [[i, j]]
        visited[i][j] = true
        sum = grid[i][j]
        while queue.any?
          x, y = queue.shift
          directions.each do |dx, dy|
            nx = x + dx
            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && !visited[nx][ny] && grid[nx][ny] > 0
              visited[nx][ny] = true
              sum += grid[nx][ny]
              queue << [nx, ny]
            end
          end
        end
        if sum % k == 0
          count += 1
        end
      end
    end
  end
  count
end

def solve(grid, k)
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size if m > 0 else 0
  visited = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, false) }
  count = 0
  directions = [ [-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1] ]
  
  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      if grid[i][j] > 0 && !visited[i][j]
        queue = [[i, j]]
        visited[i][j] = true
        sum = grid[i][j]
        while queue.any?
          x, y = queue.shift
          directions.each do |dx, dy|
            nx = x + dx
            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && !visited[nx][ny] && grid[nx][ny] > 0
              visited[nx][ny] = true
              sum += grid[nx][ny]
              queue << [nx, ny]
            end
          end
        end
        if sum % k == 0
          count += 1
        end
      end
    end
  end
  count
end
